children.label: A
children.text: A toxic chemical and its precursors, except where intended for a purpose not prohibited under this chapter as long as the type and quantity is consistent with such a purpose.

children.label: B
children.text: A munition or device, specifically designed to cause death or other harm through toxic properties of those toxic chemicals specified in subparagraph (A), which would be released as a result of the employment of such munition or device.

children.label: C
children.text: Any equipment specifically designed for use directly in connection with the employment of munitions or devices specified in subparagraph (B).

children.heading: Chemical Weapons Convention; Convention
children.label: 2 Chemical Weapons Convention; Convention
children.text: The terms “Chemical Weapons Convention” and “Convention” mean the Convention on the Prohibition of the Development, Production, Stockpiling and Use of Chemical Weapons and on Their Destruction, opened for signature on .January 13, 1993

children.heading: Key component of a binary or multicomponent chemical system
children.label: 3 Key component of a binary or multicomponent chemical system
children.text: The term “key component of a binary or multicomponent chemical system” means the precursor which plays the most important role in determining the toxic properties of the final product and reacts rapidly with other chemicals in the binary or multicomponent system.

children.heading: National of the United States
children.label: 4 National of the United States
children.text: The term “national of the United States” has the same meaning given such term in .section 1101(a)(22) of title 8

children.heading: Organization
children.label: 5 Organization
children.text: The term “Organization” means the Organization for the Prohibition of Chemical Weapons.

children.heading: Person
children.label: 6 Person
children.text: The term “person”, except as otherwise provided, means any individual, corporation, partnership, firm, association, trust, estate, public or private institution, any State or any political subdivision thereof, or any political entity within a State, any foreign government or nation or any agency, instrumentality or political subdivision of any such government or nation, or other entity located in the United States.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The term “precursor” means any chemical reactant which takes part at any stage in the production by whatever method of a toxic chemical. The term includes any key component of a binary or multicomponent chemical system.

children.heading: List of precursors
children.label: B List of precursors
children.text: Precursors which have been identified for the application of verification measures under Article VI of the Convention are listed in schedules contained in the Annex on Chemicals of the Chemical Weapons Convention.

children.heading: Purposes not prohibited by this chapter
children.label: 8 Purposes not prohibited by this chapter

children.heading: Peaceful purposes
children.label: A Peaceful purposes
children.text: Any peaceful purpose related to an industrial, agricultural, research, medical, or pharmaceutical activity or other activity.

children.heading: Protective purposes
children.label: B Protective purposes
children.text: Any purpose directly related to protection against toxic chemicals and to protection against chemical weapons.

children.heading: Unrelated military purposes
children.label: C Unrelated military purposes
children.text: Any military purpose of the United States that is not connected with the use of a chemical weapon and that is not dependent on the use of the toxic or poisonous properties of the chemical weapon to cause death or other harm.

children.heading: Law enforcement purposes
children.label: D Law enforcement purposes
children.text: Any law enforcement purpose, including any domestic riot control purpose and including imposition of capital punishment.

children.heading: Technical Secretariat
children.label: 9 Technical Secretariat
children.text: The term “Technical Secretariat” means the Technical Secretariat of the Organization for the Prohibition of Chemical Weapons established by the Chemical Weapons Convention.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The term “toxic chemical” means any chemical which through its chemical action on life processes can cause death, temporary incapacitation or permanent harm to humans or animals. The term includes all such chemicals, regardless of their origin or of their method of production, and regardless of whether they are produced in facilities, in munitions or elsewhere.

children.heading: List of toxic chemicals
children.label: B List of toxic chemicals
children.text: Toxic chemicals which have been identified for the application of verification measures under Article VI of the Convention are listed in schedules contained in the Annex on Chemicals of the Chemical Weapons Convention.

children.label: A
children.text: any of the places within the provisions of paragraph (41) of ;2section 40102 of title 49See References in Text note below.2

children.label: B
children.text: any civil aircraft of the United States or public aircraft, as such terms are defined in paragraphs (17) and (37), respectively, of ; and2section 40102 of title 49

children.label: C
children.text: any vessel of the United States, as such term is defined in .section 70502(b) of title 46

children.heading: Unscheduled discrete organic chemical
children.label: 15 Unscheduled discrete organic chemical
children.text: The term “unscheduled discrete organic chemical” means any chemical not listed on any schedule contained in the Annex on Chemicals of the Convention that belongs to the class of chemical compounds consisting of all compounds of carbon, except for its oxides, sulfides, and metal carbonates.
